description: files shouldn't be on a task card - it should be a top level item on the dashboard tool bar that shows the current filesystem

plan review requested for Step 6 (Integrate Project File Browser into App)
plan review Step 6: REVISE
log.outcome: The plan for Step 6 has a critical factual error: it assumes `rootDir` is available from `fetchConfig()`, but the `/config` endpoint currently only returns `{ maxConcurrent, maxWorktrees }`. The endpoint does not include `rootDir`. This will cause the implementation to fail at runtime because the code will try to access `cfg.rootDir` which will be `undefined`.

The Header component receives the toggle callback and active state, rendering the Files button in both desktop and mobile views.
